aboutView.title: About
aboutView.description: EUDORA AESTHETIC is a modern skincare and aesthetic clinic app that helps you manage your beauty journey with ease and confidence.
aboutView.feature3: Secure chat with certified doctors and consultants

accountIssuesDesc: Help for login, registration, or account settings problems.
bookingProblemsDesc: Information and solutions for booking issues.
treatmentInfoDesc: Details about services and treatments available at the clinic.
appTechnicalDesc: Solutions for technical problems in the app.
contactSupportDesc: How to contact our support team for further help.
intro: EUDORA AESTHETIC is a mobile application operated by Eudora International Group. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our app.
section1Bullet1: Location Data: Used to help users find the nearest clinic and provide location-based services.
section1Bullet2: Notifications: Used to send appointment reminders, promotional offers, and important updates.
section1Bullet3: Account Information: When you register or log in, we may collect your name, email, phone number, and other necessary data.
section1Bullet4: Payment Information: When you make a purchase or payment through the app, transaction-related information is securely processed via our payment partners. We do not store full credit card details on our servers.
section1Bullet5: Communication with Professionals: Our app allows communication between users and certified professionals (e.g., doctors) through a secure chat interface. All communication is private and follows applicable privacy and data protection regulations.
section2Bullet1: Facilitate appointment bookings and clinic services.
section2Bullet3: Communicate with you via push notifications or messages.
section2Bullet4: Process payments and provide transaction history.
section3Bullet1: We do not sell or rent your data to third parties.
section3Bullet2: Data is only shared with trusted partners (e.g., payment processors) as needed to provide our services.
section3Bullet3: We implement industry-standard security practices to protect your data.
section4Bullet1: You may enable or disable location services at any time through your device settings.
section4Bullet2: Manage notification preferences within the app or device settings.
section4Bullet3: Request deletion or access to your personal data by contacting us.
section5Text: This app is not intended for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
section6Text: We may update this policy from time to time. All changes will be posted within the app or on a publicly accessible URL.
section7Text: If you have any questions or requests about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:
section8Text: We strive to have 100% satisfaction with all of our customers. If there is an issue with your order or our service, email us at helpeudora@gmail.com and we will do our best to help to solve your problem.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions - EUDORA AESTHETIC
terms.section1Content: By downloading, accessing, or using the EUDORA AESTHETIC mobile application, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please refrain from using the app.
terms.section2Bullet1: The app provides features such as booking appointments, viewing promotions, and accessing clinic information.
terms.section2Bullet2: All services are subject to availability and may change without prior notice.
terms.section3Bullet1: Provide accurate and up-to-date information when registering.
terms.section3Bullet2: Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials.
terms.section3Bullet3: Use the app only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.section4Bullet1: Bookings can be made directly through the app.
terms.section4Bullet2: Prices may change without prior notice.
terms.section4Bullet3: Payments can be made via available payment methods or at the clinic.
terms.section4Bullet4: Cancellation or rescheduling must follow the clinic's cancellation policy.
terms.section5Bullet1: We are not responsible for damages caused by misuse of the application.
terms.section5Bullet2: Service results may vary depending on individual conditions.
terms.section6Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes will be communicated through the app or our website.
terms.section7Content: For questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, contact us at:
